name: Battle Bricks-Chapter 1 [TUMORE]
description:
The experience of Battle Bricks' Chapter 1 Tumore mode but way 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝓲𝓮𝓻

Characters you may find:

-Blonde Battler

-Builder Battler

-Brigand Battler

-Stunner Battler

-Soccer Battler

-Sniper Battler

-Crocket Battler

-Dual Regen Battler

-Dual Gravity Battler

-Dual Speed Battler

-Kamikaze Battler

-Arson Battler

-Telamon Battler

-Banhammer Battler

-Terminator

-Hellfighter

-Deathbringer

EXAMS ARE OVER LET'S FUCKING GOOOOO! A friend of mine gave me the idea to make a bot based off Battle Bricks, a game we both love. And so here it is, Chapter 1 of the Battle Bricks in Tumor Mode! Enjoy ts

Song used: Blame The Flame (Battle Bricks)
creator: DaTruePandemonium
